task_completion.description: Access the settings for the 'Billing Department' mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout web interface shows the settings or configuration page specifically for the 'Billing Department' (billing@acme-finance.com) mailbox.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section where BCC settings can be modified
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the specific settings tab or section (e.g., Connection, Sending, or General settings) containing the 'BCC' or 'BCC Outgoing Emails' input field.

task_completion.description: Configure the BCC address to the compliance archive
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email address 'audit-vault@acme-finance.com' is typed into the BCC input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the existing SMTP Host configuration remains intact
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SMTP Host input field is visible and contains the value 'mail.acme-finance.com' without any modifications.
A success message, toast notification (e.g., 'Saved', 'Settings updated'), or visual confirmation that the Save button was clicked and the changes were applied successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeScout web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying the FreeScout UI, rather than terminal commands (like curl or sqlite3) modifying the backend directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the decoy mailbox
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent opening, editing, or saving settings for the 'support@acme-finance.com' mailbox.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar, UI elements, and interactions should look like a genuine FreeScout instance, not a text editor or a locally created mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'Billing Department' (billing@acme-finance.com). Expected BCC: 'audit-vault@acme-finance.com'. Expected SMTP Host: 'mail.acme-finance.com'. Expected SMTP User: 'billing@acme-finance.com'. Decoy Mailbox: 'support@acme-finance.com' (must remain untouched).
